summary: Comprehensive QA Audit - Iteration 56. Tested new pages: Challenge Generator, Tone Switcher, History, Billing, Feature Requests. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: History page showed 0 for all stats because API returns 'generations' but code expected 'content'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated setGenerations to handle both 'generations' and 'content' response fields

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Feature Requests page showed 'Failed to load feature requests' - backend endpoint was missing
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Created new feature_requests.py router with full CRUD and voting functionality
Added import and include_router for feature_requests_router

features_verified: Duration selection (7 Days/30 Days with credit pricing)
Generate button with correct credit cost display
5 tone options (Funny, Aggressive/Bold, Calm & Peaceful, Luxury/Premium, Motivational)
Generate button with dynamic credit cost
Stats display now shows correct counts (Total: 50, Reels: 50, Stories: 0, Credits: 500)
Type filter dropdown (All Types/Reels Only/Stories Only)
Empty state with 'Go to Dashboard' button
Credits display in header shows actual balance (999999999 for demo user)
4 Subscription Plans: Weekly (₹199/50cr), Monthly (₹699/200cr), Quarterly (₹1999/500cr), Yearly (₹5999/2500cr)
Subscribe and Buy Now buttons all present
billing.note: The '0 Credits' bug mentioned in review request was already fixed - credits display works correctly

features_verified: Category dropdown (7 options: New Feature, Improvement, Bug Fix, UI/UX, Integration, Performance, Other)
feature_requests.bug_fixed: Created new backend endpoint /api/feature-requests with full CRUD and voting

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new pages are fully functional
Form validations working correctly on all pages
All dropdowns populate with options from API
Credit deduction logic implemented in Challenge Generator and Tone Switcher
seed_data_creation: Created test feature request 'Test Feature Request from QA' for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new pages (Challenge Generator, Tone Switcher, History, Billing, Feature Requests) are fully functional. Two bugs were found and fixed: 1) History page API response field mismatch, 2) Missing Feature Requests backend endpoint. Billing page credits display was already working correctly (not showing '0 Credits' as mentioned in review request).
